steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The astronomers “attributed ______ to the gravitational influence.” The pronoun refers back to “the wobble,” which they were observing.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content: The pronoun must match its antecedent in number. Since the wobble is singular, the pronoun must be singular; it is the only singular choice. Them and these are plural, while each is not used as a simple pronoun reference. This matches choice B — B is correct.
